checks.name: schema
checks.detail: Manifest schemaVersion must be 1, 2, 3, or 4.

checks.name: status
checks.detail: Unknown manifest status.

checks.name: provider-match
checks.detail: Perigee and NOAA digests must match.

checks.name: provider-digests
checks.detail: Provider digests differ.

checks.name: prediction-count
checks.detail: Expected at least eight high/low predictions.

checks.name: highest-value
checks.detail: Derived highest prediction does not match source data.

checks.name: threshold
checks.detail: Manifest threshold differs from the checked-in almanac.

checks.name: content-type-policy
checks.detail: Content type must belong to exactly one review policy.

checks.name: approval-policy
checks.detail: Approval policy must be automatic-after-validation for weekly-tide.

checks.name: caption-prediction
checks.detail: Caption must include “prediction”.

checks.name: caption-mllw
checks.detail: Caption must include “MLLW”.

checks.name: caption-8665530
checks.detail: Caption must include “8665530”.

checks.name: caption-noaa
checks.detail: Caption must include “NOAA”.

checks.name: caption-not-for-navigation
checks.detail: Caption must include “not for navigation”.

checks.name: prohibited-claims
checks.detail: Caption contains a prohibited claim.

checks.name: caption-length
checks.detail: Caption must be 1–2200 characters.

checks.name: facebook-caption-terms
checks.detail: Facebook caption must preserve every required prediction boundary term.

checks.name: facebook-caption-claims
checks.detail: Facebook caption contains a prohibited claim.

checks.name: facebook-caption-discovery
checks.detail: Facebook caption must preserve approved discovery hashtags.

checks.name: discovery-market
checks.detail: Caption must lead with the configured local market label.

checks.name: discovery-keywords
checks.detail: Discovery plan must include at least three local search phrases.

checks.name: discovery-hashtag-count
checks.detail: Use 5–10 focused hashtags instead of a generic or stuffed set.

checks.name: discovery-hashtag-format
checks.detail: Hashtags must contain only letters and numbers after #.

checks.name: discovery-hashtag-unique
checks.detail: Hashtags must be unique.

checks.name: discovery-local-hashtags
checks.detail: At least two local hashtags must be present in the final set.

checks.name: discovery-caption-hashtags
checks.detail: Every approved discovery hashtag must appear in the caption.

checks.name: discovery-engagement
checks.detail: Caption must include the useful local engagement prompt.

checks.name: discovery-location
checks.detail: Location plan must name an existing-place candidate, preserve station coordinates, and declare API or manual delivery.

checks.name: cta
checks.detail: CTA must be an attributed perigeetides.com HTTPS URL.

checks.name: facebook-cta
checks.detail: Facebook CTA must be an attributed perigeetides.com HTTPS URL.

checks.name: no-secrets
checks.detail: Manifest appears to contain an access token or app secret.

checks.name: slide-count
checks.detail: Instagram carousel must contain five slides.

checks.name: slide-order
checks.detail: Carousel slides must be unique and ordered exactly 1 through 5.

checks.name: design-system
checks.detail: Manifest must use perigee-feed-v2-full-generation.

checks.name: no-background-artwork
checks.detail: Full-generation manifests must not attach separate background artwork.

checks.name: generation-brief-path
checks.detail: Generation brief must live beside the manifest.

checks.name: generation-brief-post
checks.detail: Generation brief post ID differs from the manifest.

checks.name: generation-brief-design
checks.detail: Generation brief design system is stale.

checks.name: generation-brief-generator
checks.detail: Generation brief must require Codex built-in image generation.

checks.name: generation-brief-slide-count
checks.detail: Generation brief must contain five complete-slide prompts.

checks.name: generation-brief-no-overlays
checks.detail: Generation brief must prohibit deterministic overlays and compositing.

checks.name: generation-brief-facts
checks.detail: Generation brief facts differ from the current frozen manifest.

checks.name: generation-brief-prompts
checks.detail: Generation brief prompts differ from the current frozen manifest and design system.

checks.name: slide-1-path
checks.detail: Slide must live below its manifest directory.

checks.name: slide-1-generated-by
checks.detail: Finished slide must be generated by Codex.

checks.name: slide-1-generator
checks.detail: Finished slide must use Codex built-in image generation.

checks.name: slide-1-factual-content
checks.detail: Finished generated slide must include its factual presentation and visible copy.

checks.name: slide-1-reviewed
checks.detail: Codex must inspect the finished slide against its exact prompt and data.

checks.name: slide-1-prompt
checks.detail: Slide prompt hash differs from the frozen generation brief.

checks.name: slide-1-no-compositing
checks.detail: Only image orientation, sizing, and JPEG normalization are allowed after generation.

checks.name: slide-1-source-digest
checks.detail: Generated source image checksum is missing.

checks.name: slide-1-format
checks.detail: Slide must be JPEG.

checks.name: slide-1-size
checks.detail: Slide must be 1080×1350.

checks.name: slide-1-digest
checks.detail: Slide checksum changed after attachment.

checks.name: slide-1-alt
checks.detail: Alt text must be 40–1000 characters.
